raw_text: contact: address: avda/ europa, n* 28 28224 madrid spain telephone: +34 615 163 191 e-mail: cgcabetas@gmail.c om linkedin: www.linkedin.com/in /cgcabetas it skills: high level: matlab simulink doors microsoft office latex others: fun2 mimos oasis catia abaqus solid edge cyclepad proosis ampl nest ansys xflr5 other data: available for travelling and working abroad driving license (b) other interests: economics, politics, finance, risk management, running, padel, ski, travel. carmen garcía cabetas bleed air system engineer for airbus ata36 design office passionate about aircraft systems, challenges, and teamwork. currently working as a consultant and engineer on behalf of airbus bleed air system design office on airbus civil aircraft programs. eager to learn. work experience: capgemini engineering: bleed air system engineer & consultant for airbus (may 2021 present) activities on behalf of airbus ata36 (bleed air system) design office on civil aircraft programs: programs: a380, saceo, saneo, a321neo xlr, saneo pip, lr, alize. - v&v activities: ltrs, gtrs, ftrs, v&v summaries, sdd. iterations with stakeholders (i.e. safety, fesra, fts, sei) - management of non-compliances - control & monitoring activities - support to safety impact analysis (sia) - si (special instruction) requests for map/fal (i.e. ohds heat gun tests) - customer support: rfw of a320ceo and misp of saneo. support to rca, ftrs, ftls. collaboration with other atass for test procedures definition. communication with supplier for equipment instrumentation and concessions. deviation documentation and rdts/fcdas for a permit to fly. analysis of data from flight tests. - training to new entry team members - work on tools: doors, fun2, oasis-sirocco - knowledge on config. managemet and airbus processes, and certificates from airbus trainings: - systems engineering requirement and v&v management with doors - mimos for system engineering (maintenance information management tool for systems) european space agency: fly your thesis 2021- parabolic flight campaign researcher (dec 2020 - nov 2021) fyt program to test prototype in zero-g parabolic flight for microgravity conditions. create a proof of concept and increase trl of the prototype to be launched into space. after 1 year in programme, worked for 2 weeks at novespace for preparation of experiment on the plane, with esa members and novespace experts, and then flew in the zero-g parabolic flight at bordeaux. dzh dynamics research group: adcs engineer (aug 2020 nov 2021) research in advanced attitude control methods for space applications, using inertia morphing spacecraft, targeting the cubesat market. design and prototyping of attitude determination and control system. airbus defense & space: flight dynamics, orbit determination (ax airbus xplorer) (feb - june 2019) curricular practicum & degree final project. orbit determination for leop phase in cheops mission. flight dynamics interface & algorithm for orbit prediction. algorithm, fed by observations, estimates orbit trajectory. education: - award - 1s position in nanostar detailed design and test challenges 2021 european interuniversity challenge composed by more than 300 students and young professionals, joining challenges related to nanosatellites and new space technologies. - gravity-related experiments training (jan 2021) design, develop, test, and perform a gravity-related scientific experiment or technology demonstration. lectures, workshops, and meetings with experts before experiment campaign. esa academy - master in aeronautical engineering (sept 2019 oct 2021) universidad carlos ill de madrid - program in business skills: seedbed ax (feb june 2019) teamwork, team building, effective presentations, innovation, customer focus, personal branding, communication, project management, business innovation plan: thermal energy recovering & reuse in autoclaves. escuela de organización industrial, eo! - exchange programs (aerospace engineering) royal melbourne institute of technology, rmit, melbourne, australia (july - dec 2018) queensland university of technology, qut, brisbane, australia (july - dec 2017) - bachelor in aerospace engineering: mention in aerospace vehicles (sept 15 - oct 19) universidad carlos ill de madrid - excellence scholarship (2016) - becas de excelencia 2015 - 2016 comunidad de maarid languages: spanish / native english / fluent: undergraduate and postgraduate studies in english. lived two semesters in australia: brisbane (2017) and melbourne (2018). lived for a year in the usa (2013-2014): - riverside-brookfield high school, riverside, illinois, usa & linn-mar high school, marion, lowa, usa student exchange: the teresian school, dublin, ireland (2012) british council english lessons. three summers in guildford, england.
